summary: Taiki has flipped bullish in his latest video, explicitly stating that the crypto market bottom is in and predicting higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After spending months successfully shorting Ethereum, he has pivoted his thesis to argue that the market has now bottomed out. He points to new marginal buying forces like STRC as potential catalysts to propel Bitcoin higher, suggesting the start of a new uptrend despite previous bearish calls.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
